requirement_topic.en: Market Access and Conformity — INMETRO OCP Process, SBAC, and Labeling
requirement_topic.zh: 市场准入与合规 — INMETRO OCP 流程、SBAC 及标签要求
requirement_topic.zht: 市場准入與合規 — INMETRO OCP 流程、SBAC 及標籤要求

summary.en: Products subject to INMETRO compulsory certification must be certified through an INMETRO-accredited OCP (Organismo de Certificação de Produtos) before importation or sale in Brazil. The process is governed by RGCP — Portaria INMETRO 200/2021 (Requisitos Gerais de Certificação de Produtos), which establishes the general product certification framework including application, technical file review, factory audit (if required), laboratory testing, certificate issuance, and ongoing surveillance. The INMETRO conformity mark (Marca de Conformidade) must be affixed to certified products per Portaria INMETRO 274/2014. The SBAC (Sistema Brasileiro de Avaliação da Conformidade) is the overarching framework that encompasses INMETRO's compulsory and voluntary certification programs, Anatel homologation, ANVISA (health products), and ANAC (aviation equipment). For BESS, the relevant regulatory pillars are ANEEL/ANTT (grid and transport — confirmed applicable) and Anatel (if wireless modules are integrated). IMPORTANT: No confirmed INMETRO compulsory certification scheme (portaria/RAC) for complete stationary BESS units could be verified as of mid-2026; ABNT NBR IEC 62619 / IEC 62933-5-2 may apply by project specification or as a condition of ANEEL grid access, but not as a confirmed INMETRO compulsory certification requirement. Verify the current INMETRO portaria registry (inmetro.gov.br) before treating stationary BESS as a compulsorily certified product category. All product documentation including user manuals, safety labels, and installation instructions must be in Portuguese for market access in Brazil. CCC (China Compulsory Certification) marks and CE marks have no legal standing in Brazil.
summary.zh: 受 INMETRO 强制认证约束的产品，须在进口或在巴西销售前通过 INMETRO 认可的 OCP（产品认证机构）完成认证。该流程由 RGCP——INMETRO 第 200/2021 号部令（产品认证通用要求）规范，建立了包括申请、技术文件审查、工厂审核（如需）、实验室测试、证书颁发及持续监督在内的产品认证通用框架。经认证的产品须依据 INMETRO 第 274/2014 号部令贴附 INMETRO 合格标志（Marca de Conformidade）。SBAC（巴西合规评估体系）是涵盖 INMETRO 强制性和自愿性认证项目、Anatel 型号核准、ANVISA（卫生产品）及 ANAC（航空设备）的综合框架。对于 BESS，已确认适用的监管支柱为 ANEEL/ANTT（并网与运输）及 Anatel（如集成无线模块）。重要提示：截至 2026 年中，未能确认针对完整固定式 BESS 的 INMETRO 强制认证方案（部令/RAC）；ABNT NBR IEC 62619/IEC 62933-5-2 可能依项目规范或作为 ANEEL 并网接入条件而适用，但尚未被确认为 INMETRO 强制认证要求。在将固定式 BESS 视为强制认证产品类别前，请在 inmetro.gov.br 核实最新 INMETRO 部令注册表。进入巴西市场的所有产品文件，包括用户手册、安全标签及安装说明，须以葡萄牙语提供。中国 CCC 强制认证标志及欧盟 CE 标志在巴西不具法律效力。
summary.zht: 受 INMETRO 強制認證約束的產品，須在進口或在巴西銷售前通過 INMETRO 認可的 OCP（產品認證機構）完成認證。該流程由 RGCP——INMETRO 第 200/2021 號部令（產品認證通用要求）規範，建立了包括申請、技術文件審查、工廠審核（如需）、實驗室測試、證書頒發及持續監督在內的產品認證通用框架。經認證的產品須依據 INMETRO 第 274/2014 號部令貼附 INMETRO 合格標誌（Marca de Conformidade）。SBAC（巴西合規評估體系）是涵蓋 INMETRO 強制性和自願性認證項目、Anatel 型號核准、ANVISA（衛生產品）及 ANAC（航空設備）的綜合框架。對於 BESS，已確認適用的監管支柱為 ANEEL/ANTT（併網與運輸）及 Anatel（如整合無線模組）。重要提示：截至 2026 年中，未能確認針對完整固定式 BESS 的 INMETRO 強制認證方案（部令/RAC）；ABNT NBR IEC 62619/IEC 62933-5-2 可能依項目規範或作為 ANEEL 併網接入條件而適用，但尚未被確認為 INMETRO 強制認證要求。在將固定式 BESS 視為強制認證產品類別前，請在 inmetro.gov.br 核實最新 INMETRO 部令登記冊。進入巴西市場的所有產品文件，包括用戶手冊、安全標籤及安裝說明，須以葡萄牙語提供。中國 CCC 強制認證標誌及歐盟 CE 標誌在巴西不具法律效力。

standards_or_laws: Portaria INMETRO no. 200/2021 — RGCP (Requisitos Gerais de Certificação de Produtos — general product certification requirements)
Portaria INMETRO no. 274/2014 — Rules for use of INMETRO conformity identification seals/marks
Lei no. 9.933/1999 — Establishes INMETRO compulsory certification legal framework
SBAC — Sistema Brasileiro de Avaliação da Conformidade (overarching framework)

summary.en: China's CCC (China Compulsory Certification / 强制性产品认证 / 3C认证) scheme is administered by CNCA (Certification and Accreditation Administration of China) and requires mandatory certification for products listed in the CCC catalogue before domestic sale or import into China. BESS (stationary) had not been confirmed in the CCC catalogue as of mid-2026 (see safety fragment). The CCC process involves testing by CNAS-accredited labs and factory inspection. CCC certificates and marks have no legal recognition in Brazil. Chinese exporters must treat INMETRO as a parallel, independent certification pathway with no mutual recognition pathway.
summary.zh: 中国强制产品认证（CCC/3C 认证）制度由国家认证认可监督管理委员会（CNCA）负责，要求列入 CCC 目录的产品在国内销售或进口至中国前取得强制认证。截至 2026 年中，固定式 BESS 尚未被确认纳入 CCC 目录（见安全专题条目）。CCC 流程涉及 CNAS 认可实验室测试及工厂审查。CCC 证书及标志在巴西不具法律认可效力。中国出口商须将 INMETRO 视为独立的认证路径，两者之间不存在互认路径。
summary.zht: 中國強制產品認證（CCC/3C 認證）制度由國家認證認可監督管理委員會（CNCA）負責，要求列入 CCC 目錄的產品在國內銷售或進口至中國前取得強制認證。截至 2026 年中，固定式 BESS 尚未被確認納入 CCC 目錄（見安全專題條目）。CCC 流程涉及 CNAS 認可實驗室測試及工廠審查。CCC 證書及標誌在巴西不具法律認可效力。中國出口商須將 INMETRO 視為獨立的認證路徑，兩者之間不存在互認路徑。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification / 强制性产品认证) — administered by CNCA; domestic China market-access requirement
CNCA-00C-005 — General rules for CCC certification (and product-specific implementation rules)

gap.en: No mutual recognition agreement (MRA) exists between Brazil's INMETRO/SBAC and China's CCC/CNCA for BESS or related electrical equipment. Chinese CCC certificates, CE marks, UL listings, and test reports from Chinese CNAS labs do not provide automatic INMETRO certification. CRITICAL CAVEAT: As of mid-2026, no confirmed INMETRO compulsory certification portaria/RAC for complete stationary BESS units has been verified — the applicability of the INMETRO compulsory scheme to stationary BESS must be confirmed with INMETRO DCONF or a Brazilian OCP before assuming a certification obligation exists. Where an applicable portaria is confirmed, Chinese exporters must: (1) identify the applicable INMETRO portaria and RAC for the BESS product category; (2) engage an INMETRO-accredited OCP; (3) arrange testing at a CGCRE-accredited laboratory (or foreign ILAC-recognised lab where accepted by the OCP); (4) undergo factory audit if required; (5) obtain the INMETRO certificate and affix the INMETRO mark before importation; (6) prepare all product documentation, manuals, and safety labels in Portuguese. The typical certification timeline is 6–12 months for a new product. Importers must hold a valid Brazilian importer registration (CNPJ). ABNT NBR IEC 62619 / IEC 62933-5-2 compliance may still be required by project specifications or ANEEL grid-access rules regardless of INMETRO compulsory status.
gap.zh: 巴西 INMETRO/SBAC 与中国 CCC/CNCA 之间就 BESS 或相关电气设备不存在互认协议（MRA）。中国 CCC 证书、CE 标志、UL 认证及 CNAS 实验室测试报告不自动提供 INMETRO 认证。关键注意：截至 2026 年中，未能确认针对完整固定式 BESS 的 INMETRO 强制认证部令/RAC——在假定存在强制认证义务前，须向 INMETRO DCONF 或巴西 OCP 机构确认 INMETRO 强制认证方案是否适用于固定式 BESS。如确认适用部令，中国出口商须：（1）确认 BESS 产品类别适用的 INMETRO 部令及 RAC；（2）委托 INMETRO 认可的 OCP 机构；（3）在 CGCRE 认可实验室（或 OCP 接受的持 ILAC 认可境外实验室）安排测试；（4）如需，接受工厂审核；（5）在进口前取得 INMETRO 证书并贴附 INMETRO 标志；（6）以葡萄牙语准备所有产品文件、手册及安全标签。新产品的典型认证周期为 6 至 12 个月。进口商须持有有效的巴西进口商注册（CNPJ）。无论 INMETRO 强制认证状态如何，ABNT NBR IEC 62619/IEC 62933-5-2 合规仍可能依项目规范或 ANEEL 并网接入规则而被要求。
gap.zht: 巴西 INMETRO/SBAC 與中國 CCC/CNCA 之間就 BESS 或相關電氣設備不存在互認協議（MRA）。中國 CCC 證書、CE 標誌、UL 認證及 CNAS 實驗室測試報告不自動提供 INMETRO 認證。關鍵注意：截至 2026 年中，未能確認針對完整固定式 BESS 的 INMETRO 強制認證部令/RAC——在假定存在強制認證義務前，須向 INMETRO DCONF 或巴西 OCP 機構確認 INMETRO 強制認證方案是否適用於固定式 BESS。如確認適用部令，中國出口商須：（1）確認 BESS 產品類別適用的 INMETRO 部令及 RAC；（2）委託 INMETRO 認可的 OCP 機構；（3）在 CGCRE 認可實驗室（或 OCP 接受的持 ILAC 認可境外實驗室）安排測試；（4）如需，接受工廠審核；（5）在進口前取得 INMETRO 證書並貼附 INMETRO 標誌；（6）以葡萄牙語準備所有產品文件、手冊及安全標籤。新產品的典型認證週期為 6 至 12 個月。進口商須持有有效的巴西進口商登記（CNPJ）。無論 INMETRO 強制認證狀態如何，ABNT NBR IEC 62619/IEC 62933-5-2 合規仍可能依項目規範或 ANEEL 併網接入規則而被要求。

mandatory_status.target: Conditional — INMETRO compulsory certification is mandatory for products confirmed within a published INMETRO portaria/RAC scope; no confirmed INMETRO compulsory certification scheme for complete stationary BESS units could be verified as of mid-2026 — verify current INMETRO portaria scope before treating BESS as a compulsorily certified product category. SBAC framework and Portuguese-language documentation requirements are legally binding for Brazilian market access generally.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for products in the CCC catalogue (stationary BESS not confirmed in scope as of mid-2026 — verify with CNCA); Chinese market requires Chinese-language documentation

source.publisher: INMETRO — Instituto Nacional de Metrologia, Qualidade e Tecnologia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL — UNVERIFIED SCOPE] No confirmed INMETRO compulsory certification scheme for complete stationary BESS units has been verified as of mid-2026. Verify the current INMETRO portaria scope with INMETRO DCONF or a Brazilian OCP before assuming a compulsory certification obligation. No mutual recognition pathway exists between Chinese CCC/CNCA and Brazilian INMETRO/SBAC. ABNT NBR IEC 62619 / IEC 62933-5-2 compliance may be required independently by project specifications or ANEEL grid-access rules. All product documentation must be in Portuguese. CCC marks and CE marks carry no legal weight in Brazil.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考——范围待核实] 截至 2026 年中，未能确认针对完整固定式 BESS 的 INMETRO 强制认证方案。在假定存在强制认证义务前，请向 INMETRO DCONF 或巴西 OCP 机构核实最新 INMETRO 部令范围。中国 CCC/CNCA 与巴西 INMETRO/SBAC 之间不存在互认路径。ABNT NBR IEC 62619/IEC 62933-5-2 合规仍可能依项目规范或 ANEEL 并网接入规则独立要求。所有产品文件须以葡萄牙语提供。CCC 标志及 CE 标志在巴西不具法律效力。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考——範圍待核實] 截至 2026 年中，未能確認針對完整固定式 BESS 的 INMETRO 強制認證方案。在假定存在強制認證義務前，請向 INMETRO DCONF 或巴西 OCP 機構核實最新 INMETRO 部令範圍。中國 CCC/CNCA 與巴西 INMETRO/SBAC 之間不存在互認路徑。ABNT NBR IEC 62619/IEC 62933-5-2 合規仍可能依項目規範或 ANEEL 併網接入規則獨立要求。所有產品文件須以葡萄牙語提供。CCC 標誌及 CE 標誌在巴西不具法律效力。
